message:
audit: batch 477 — h3_native.rs + postgres.rs SOUND

h3_native.rs (3114L): HTTP/3 frame ordering and stream state correct.
postgres.rs (5596L): SCRAM-SHA-256 well-hardened — constant-time sig
verify, 600K iteration cap, NUL truncation, 64MiB message cap,
cancel_in_flight connection shutdown, MD5 auth refused.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
